title: Intelligenism Agent Framework (IAF) — Architecture Overview
description: Complete architecture deep dive: four-layer design, possibility management, signal topology, AI operability, and the theory behind the framework.

title: IAF v1.0 — Four-Layer Architecture Complete
description: All four layers complete: Agent, Dispatch, Tube, and UI. Signal topology, multi-agent collaboration, and full toolset shipped.

title: AITF Protocol v4.0 — Agent Interaction Text Format
description: The expression language for all agent documents. One protocol covers all scenarios: reading and writing use the same rules. Node types, status codes, structure rules, and governance.

title: IAF v0.9 — First Public Release
description: Agent Layer and UI Layer complete. Dispatch and Scheduler architecture designed, implementation in progress.

title: Intelligenism — Condensed Theory Reference
description: Core theory of Intelligenism: from epistemology to organisational intelligence, the Intelligent Consortium, and carbon-silicon symbiosis.
